task_completion.description: Create a style named 'country_semantic_zoom' in the 'ne' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer 'Styles' page, a style named 'country_semantic_zoom' is being created or edited, and the workspace dropdown is set to 'ne'.

task_completion.description: Configure the polygon rule for scale < 35,000,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor, look for a rule containing <MaxScaleDenominator>35000000</MaxScaleDenominator>, a <PolygonSymbolizer>, and CSS parameters for fill '#E0E0E0' and stroke '#333333'.

task_completion.description: Configure the point rule for scale >= 35,000,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SLD editor, look for a rule containing <MinScaleDenominator>35000000</MinScaleDenominator>, a <PointSymbolizer> with a circle mark, <Size>6</Size>, and a fill color of '#FF0000'.

task_completion.description: Apply geometry transformation to the point rule
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the <PointSymbolizer> rule in the SLD editor, look for a <Geometry> tag containing an OGC function like <ogc:Function name="centroid"> or <ogc:Function name="interiorPoint">.

task_completion.description: Apply the style to the 'ne:ne_countries' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page for 'ne_countries', under the 'Publishing' tab, the 'country_semantic_zoom' style is selected as the Default Style or added to the Available Styles.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GeoServer web interface being navigated and interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The SLD was edited and saved within GeoServer.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SLD code is visible inside the GeoServer style editor text area, and there is evidence of saving or validating the style within the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected style name is 'country_semantic_zoom'. The scale threshold is 35000000. For zoomed-in polygons (scale < 35000000), the fill color is #E0E0E0 and stroke is #333333. For zoomed-out points (scale >= 35000000), the fill color is #FF0000, circle size is 6, and it must use the OGC geometry transformation function 'centroid' or 'interiorPoint' to convert polygons to points.
